summary: Mixed review noting a date discrepancy, with no details on sound quality or performance.
review: The sole reviewer points out that the recording is from June 26‑1994 rather than the listed June 24‑1994, rating the show as average (3 stars). No comments are made about the audio source, clarity, or musical highlights, leaving both recording and show quality undefined.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a neutral 3‑star rating and no substantive information on performance or recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound quality, source type, or mix; reviewer did not address recording aspects.
